title: Crispy Chicken Drumsticks
description: A simple and delicious recipe to make crispy chicken drumsticks, perfect for snacking or as a side dish.
instructions: In a shallow dish, mix together flour, salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
In a separate dish, beat the eggs.
In a third dish, place the panko breadcrumbs.
Dip each chicken drumstick into the flour mixture, coating both sides evenly.
Next, dip the floured drumstick into the beaten eggs, making sure to coat completely.
Finally, roll the egg-coated drumstick in the panko breadcrumbs, pressing gently to adhere.
Place the coated drumsticks on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle with a small amount of oil and toss to coat.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
